2026-03-02-01.title: March 2, 2026 Update
2026-03-02-01.body:
Applied Chinese translations for the Limbus Company 260226 update
Updated the published plan list to display the comment count for each plan
Fixed an issue where local plans were not being deleted properly
- The plan had already been deleted on the server. The logic has been updated to delete the local plan regardless of server-side deletion status.

2026-02-26-01.title: 2026/02/26 Update
2026-02-26-01.body:
Reflecting the Limbus Company update from February 26, 2026.
- New E.G.O Gifts added
- New Theme Pack added
Added the ability to update Mirror Dungeon plans from a previous version to the current version.
- You can update the version from each plan's detail page.
Fixed an issue where plan changes were not immediately reflected when editing a plan at /planner/md/gesellschaft/{id}.

2026-02-20-01.title: Notice of Changes to Mirror Dungeon Plan E.G.O Gift Behavior
2026-02-20-01.body:
We are informing you of changes to E.G.O Gift behavior in Mirror Dungeon Plans with today's update.
- Previous: Changes to the per-floor E.G.O Gift list would also modify the universal E.G.O Gift list, and the viewer's E.G.O Gift list showed only per-floor E.G.O Gifts.
- Updated: Changes to the per-floor E.G.O Gift list no longer affect the universal E.G.O Gift list, and the viewer's E.G.O Gift list now shows both universal and per-floor E.G.O Gifts.

Duplicate E.G.O Gifts within a plan appear only once in the viewer's list, but are still affected by the highlight and completion indicators triggered by different Theme Packs. To prevent unintended behavior changes, we kindly ask you to rewrite your E.G.O Gift lists. We apologize for any inconvenience.

2026-02-19-01.title: 2026/02/19 Update
2026-02-19-01.body:
Reflecting the Limbus Company update from February 19, 2026.

Update notes:
- Added The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather (Yi Sang) data
- Mirror of Names and Spiders Normal difficulty update
- Japanese/Chinese text corrections applied

Known issues:
- An issue has been identified where Mirror of Eternity plans fail validation on first upload. A migration path for previous Mirror Dungeon plans will be provided alongside the Hard mode update, along with a popup to prompt version upgrades when validation fails.
